displayText.headline: Chosen by Over 34 Lakh Patients Annually
displayText.subheading: Consistently ranked among the best multispeciality hospitals, backed by 3,000+ world-class doctors and pioneering clinical research.

style: High contrast, sharp geometric split-screen, clinical authority.
description: A sharp diagonal division: the top-left in deep blue hosting the trust metrics and bold text; the bottom-right featuring a warm, authentic portrait of a senior physician smiling warmly at a recovering patient.
